docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROTTACKER, BRAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, RAMON $1,001.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,056.00, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AS FOLLOWS: $150. ON 4/23/00; $100 ON 5/23/00; $100 ON 6/23/00 AND $200 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-17-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-18-2000 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PER MONTH BEGINNING 7/23/00 UNTIL JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID WITH PAYMENTS DUE ON THE 23RD OF EACH MONTH.
